servinfo.title: Precautions for Steering General Diagnosis
servinfo.ptxt: Since the problems in steering involve several systems, such possibilities should be fully considered when diagnosing a complaint. To avoid being misled by an unclear symptom, always perform the road test first. Proceed with the following preliminary inspection and correct defects if any.

s1.ptxt: Inspect tires for proper pressure and uneven wear.
Hoist vehicle and inspect steering system for loose or damaged parts.
Spin front wheels. Inspect for out-of-round tires, out-of-balance tires, bent rims, loose and/or rough wheel bearings.
